case_title: CASHCALL, INC. VS. OKSANA I. KOCHIK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-23-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT.
